mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_table( first_name, last_name, user_name, role, current_state, is_active, last_login ) VALUES( #{firstName}, #{lastName}, #{userName}, #{role}, #{currentState, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isActive}, #{lastLogin, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, first_name AS firstName, last_name AS lastName, user_name AS userName, role AS role, current_state AS currentState, is_active AS isActive, last_login AS lastLogin FROM user_table WHERE user_id = #{user_id}

SELECT user_id AS userId, first_name AS firstName, last_name AS lastName, user_name AS userName, role AS role, current_state AS currentState, is_active AS isActive, last_login AS lastLogin FROM user_table;

select u.user_id, u.first_name AS firstName, u.last_name As lastName, u.role AS role, u.is_active AS isActive, a.city AS city, a.country AS country, a.state_id AS stateId, a.lane_one As addressLine1, a.pin As zipCode, a.is_default AS isDefault, c.email_id AS emailId, c.phone_number AS phoneNumber, c.is_primary AS isPrimary From user_table u LEFT JOIN address a on u.user_id = a.user_id LEFT JOIN contact c on u.user_id = c.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_table SET first_name = #{firstName}, last_name = #{lastName}, role = #{role}, current_state = #{currentState} where user_id = #{userId}
